title: Smart Pattern System
description: 一个为 AE2(Applied Energistics 2) 设计的智能样板系统，通过矿物辞典实现通配符匹配，让单个样板可以自动匹配整个矿物辞典系列（如所有金属锭→板的转换）
body:
上半为英文/下班为中文（The first half is in English/the end of work is in Chinese）
AE2 Smart Pattern System
An intelligent template system designed for AE2 (Applied Energistics 2 ) that enables wildcard matching through a mineral dictionary, allowing a single template to automatically match the entire mineral dictionary family (e.g., conversion of all metal ingots → plates).
 ✨ Core features
Intelligent template expansion
Mineral Dictionary Wildcards: Utilize the Forge Mineral Dictionary system, supporting wildcard patterns like 'ingot*' and 'plate*'
Automatic batch generation: A template can be automatically expanded to multiple specific recipes (e.g. 'ingot*→plate*' automatically identifies all registered metal recipes based on the mineral dictionary)
AE2UEL Fully Compatible: Implements the 'ICraftingPatternItem' interface for seamless integration with the AE2 ME interface
Template Expander Block: A dedicated block is used to edit and manage Smart Templates-AE
GUI interface
GUI Usage: Right-click the template extender box to open the editing interface
Quantity setting: China Construction setting


一个为 AE2 (Applied Energistics 2 ) 设计的智能样板系统，通过矿物辞典实现通配符匹配，让单个样板可以自动匹配整个矿物辞典系列（如所有金属锭→板的转换）。
 ✨ 核心特性
智能样板扩展
矿物辞典通配符: 利用 Forge 矿物辞典系统，支持 `ingot*`、`plate*` 等通配符模式
自动批量生成: 一个样板可自动扩展为多个具体配方（如 `ingot*→plate*` 根据矿物辞典自动识别所有已注册的金属配方）
AE2UEL 完全兼容: 实现 `ICraftingPatternItem` 接口，无缝集成 AE2 ME 接口
样板扩展器方块: 专用方块用于编辑和管理智能样板-AE中需拥有该方块
GUI界面
GUI使用:手持样板右键点击样板扩展器方块打开编辑界面
数量设置: 中建设置
